_readme: This file holds everything you can change on your website. The easiest way to edit it is to open admin.html in your browser. Tip: wrap any words in *asterisks* to show them in the italic bronze accent style, e.g. "Your rate, *fixed at booking.*"

brand.name: ExecSprinters
brand.metaDescription: Chauffeured Mercedes-Benz Sprinter transportation across the Dallas–Fort Worth Metroplex. Airport transfers, corporate shuttles, and event charters. Reserved, reliable, on time.

hero.imageAlt: Black Mercedes-Benz Sprinter on the apron at a DFW airport terminal at golden hour

intro.heading: Group travel across DFW, handled like a *private arrival.*
paragraphs: Two executive Mercedes-Benz Sprinters, chauffeured by professionals and held to a single promise: you arrive together, on time, without managing a thing.
Airport transfers, scheduled shuttles, and event coordination — reserved in advance, billed on one invoice, watched over by a dispatch team that's awake when you need it.

bands.heading: Met at the curb, *not left waiting.*
bands.text: Your chauffeur arrives early, tracks the flight, handles the luggage, and is standing at the door when you reach it. The transfer starts before you've said a word.
bands.imageAlt: A uniformed chauffeur greeting an executive beside the Sprinter at a passenger pickup canopy

bands.heading: An office that *moves with you.*
bands.text: Diamond-stitched captain's chairs, climate control, and ambient light. Space to talk, prepare, or simply settle in before the meeting that matters.
bands.imageAlt: Executives seated in the diamond-stitched captain's chairs of the Sprinter interior under blue ambient lighting

bands.heading: On schedule is *the baseline.*
bands.text: Routes mapped before pickup, traffic and flights monitored live. When plans shift, dispatch reroutes — you simply arrive when you said you would.
bands.imageAlt: The Sprinter pulling up curbside at a DFW airport terminal at sunset

fleet.heading: Two Sprinters. *One standard.*
fleet.text: Both Mercedes-Benz, both maintained to commercial spec and detailed before every ride — sized for the day you're running.

vehicles.name: Lounge Sprinter
vehicles.caption: events · groups · premium comfort
vehicles.imageAlt: ExecSprinters lounge Sprinter interior with captain's chairs

testimonial.quote: They had us at the curb before the wheels stopped turning — three executives, two cities, one flawless day. ExecSprinters is the only call we make in DFW.
testimonial.author: Marcus Reynolds

quote.heading: Your rate, *fixed at booking.*
quote.sub: $150 per hour · four-hour minimum · no surge, no surprises. Private — no details required to see a number.

areas.heading: Across Dallas–Fort Worth *& beyond.*
areas.text: Headquartered in DFW and licensed across the region — focused on the corridors that keep response fast and reliability high.

list.name: Plano & Frisco — Legacy West, The Star

closing.heading: Every detail, *arranged in advance.*
closing.text: Your vehicle reserved. Your rate fixed at booking. Your itinerary held by a dispatch team that doesn't improvise.
closing.imageAlt: The Sprinter on the apron at golden hour

footer.blurb: Chauffeured Mercedes-Benz Sprinter transportation across the Dallas–Fort Worth Metroplex. Reserved. Reliable. On time.
